name: The Sincere Company, Limited
summary: The Sincere Company, Limited operates a chain of department stores in Hong Kong. The company operates four department stores, which offer fashion apparel, shoes and handbags, and sports equipment, as well as household, electrical, bedding and bath, travel, and food merchandises. It is also involved in property investment, property development, and securities trading activities; and provision of general and life insurance products. The company was founded in 1900 and is based in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
